productDisplayName: Locomotive Men's Round Neck Red T-shirt
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed neckline, short sleeves and distressed look graphic on the chestFittingRegularWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron All men like to indulge in a bit of mechanical tinkering with their vehicles.
